overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked urban plaza at night, transitioning into a covered underpass beneath a highway bridge illuminated by red neon lights, before stopping near a concrete wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza under highway overpass with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza past illuminated billboards and yellow barriers toward the underpass

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian with blue hair walking away from the camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with metal railings spanning across the background
tall illuminated advertisement display showing two figures in pink and purple neon colors
low yellow wall barriers with integrated lighting on top
tall cylindrical light pole emitting white illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza at night beneath a massive highway overpass. Digital billboards glow with pink neon advertisements while yellow concrete barriers line the right side. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the wet concrete area as the character approaches a dark underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway with red neon lighting

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath highway bridge, sky becomes obscured by concrete ceiling
ambient lighting shifts from open plaza to dominant red neon illumination from wall fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass toward the red neon lights at the end of the corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead into the underpass moving away from camera

entered.detail: circular red neon light fixtures mounted on the concrete walls emitting crimson glow
thick structural columns supporting the overhead bridge deck
large red text mural reading HATE painted on the concrete wall
illuminated yellow advertisement screen mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath the highway where red neon lights illuminate the concrete walls. A large HATE mural is visible on the left wall while the character passes thick support pillars. The environment shifts from open to enclosed as the character moves deeper into the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway bridge with red ambient lighting

events.description: character stops walking and comes to a standstill near the right concrete wall

agents.ego_description: stopping near the concrete wall and standing still, facing the red neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and stands still near the right wall of the underpass. The red neon lights continue to illuminate the corridor while the HATE mural is now further behind on the left. The scene becomes static as the character remains stationary in the sheltered concrete walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, rain-slicked urban plaza into the claustrophobic confines of a neon-lit underpass. It begins with the character walking through a wide concrete area beneath a highway overpass, surrounded by glowing pink digital billboards and yellow barriers. As the character approaches the dark entrance of a covered walkway, the environment shifts from an open public space to an enclosed corridor illuminated by stark red neon lights. The camera continues forward past thick support pillars and a large HATE mural on the left wall before the character finally comes to a halt. The scene becomes static as the character stands still against the right wall, sheltered within the red-lit concrete passage.
